onboarding.heading: Welcome to Family Fuel!
onboarding.subtext: Your AI-powered meal planning assistant to conquer the 'what's for dinner?' dilemma and reclaim your time.

onboarding.heading: Tell us about your family.
onboarding.subtext: This helps us tailor meal plans perfectly for your household.
fields: How many people are in your household?
How many children do you have?

onboarding.subtext: Select all that apply to anyone in your family.

onboarding.heading: Any allergies we should know about?
onboarding.subtext: Please list any food allergies for each family member to ensure safe meal planning.

onboarding.heading: What ingredients or foods does your family dislike?
onboarding.subtext: Tell us what to avoid. You can be as specific as you like (e.g., 'cilantro', 'broccoli', 'spicy food').

onboarding.heading: How do you typically plan your meals?
onboarding.subtext: Help us understand your family's eating habits.
fields: Which meals do you want Family Fuel to plan for?
How many dinners per week do you cook at home?
Are snacks important for your plan?

onboarding.heading: What's your preferred cooking style?
onboarding.subtext: Select the methods you enjoy or find convenient.

onboarding.heading: You're All Set!
onboarding.subtext: We've gathered everything we need to start crafting delicious, stress-free meal plans for your family. Get ready to reclaim your dinner time!

single_recipe_view.heading: One-Pan Lemon Herb Chicken & Veggies
single_recipe_view.subtext: A quick and healthy weeknight meal that's a hit with both kids and adults. Featuring tender chicken, roasted potatoes, and vibrant broccoli, all seasoned with bright lemon and savory herbs.

single_recipe_view.heading: Ingredients You'll Need
single_recipe_view.subtext: Make sure to have these on hand before you start cooking!
items: Salt and black pepper to taste

single_recipe_view.heading: How to Make It
single_recipe_view.subtext: Follow these simple steps for a perfect meal.
items: 2. In a large bowl, combine chicken, potatoes, broccoli, olive oil, lemon juice, minced garlic, oregano, thyme, salt, and pepper. Toss to evenly coat.
3. Spread the mixture in a single layer on a large baking sheet. Arrange lemon slices over the chicken.
4. Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until chicken is cooked through and vegetables are tender-crisp. Broil for 2-3 minutes at the end for extra crispiness, if desired.
5. Serve immediately and enjoy your delicious meal!

single_recipe_view.heading: Nutrition Facts (per serving, estimated)
single_recipe_view.subtext: Calories: 420, Protein: 38g, Carbs: 32g, Fat: 18g. (Note: These are estimates and may vary based on ingredients used.)

privacy_terms.heading: Family Fuel Privacy Policy
privacy_terms.subtext:
Effective Date: October 26, 2023

Welcome to Family Fuel! Your privacy is of paramount importance to us. This Privacy Policy describes how Family Fuel (referred to as “we,” “us,” or “our”) collects, uses, and discloses information about you when you use our mobile application and related services (collectively, the “Service”).

By accessing or using the Service, you signify that you have read, understood, and agree to our collection, storage, use, and disclosure of your personal information as described in this Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with the terms of this policy, please do not access or use the Service.

**1. Information We Collect**

We collect information in a few ways: directly from you, from third-party sources, and through automated technologies.

*   **Information You Provide to Us:**
    *   **Account Information:** When you create an account, we ask for your name, email address, password, and optionally, family size.
    *   **Profile Information:** You may choose to provide additional information such as dietary preferences (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free), allergies (e.g., nuts, dairy), number and age range of children, typical meal times, and preferred cooking styles.
    *   **Meal Plan & Recipe Feedback:** We collect information about your interactions with meal plans and recipes, including saved recipes, ratings, modifications, and comments. This helps us personalize future recommendations.
    *   **Communications:** If you contact us directly, we may receive additional information about you, such as your name, email address, phone number, the contents of the message and/or attachments you may send us, and any other information you choose to provide.
    *   **Payment Information:** If you subscribe to a premium service, our third-party payment processor will collect payment information. We do not store full payment card details on our servers.

*   **Information We Collect Automatically:**
    *   **Usage Data:** We collect information about your activity on the Service, such as the features you use, the time, frequency, and duration of your activities. This includes recipes viewed, meal plans generated, and grocery lists created.
    *   **Device Information:** We collect information about the device you use to access the Service, including the hardware model, operating system and version, unique device identifiers, and mobile network information.
    *   **Log Data:** Our servers automatically record information that your browser or device sends whenever you use our Service. This log data may include your IP address, browser type and settings, the date and time of your use, and cookie data.
    *   **Location Information:** We may derive your approximate location from your IP address.

*   **Information from Third Parties:**
    *   We may receive information about you from third-party services, such as social media platforms, if you choose to link your Family Fuel account with those services. The data we receive is dependent upon your privacy settings with those third-party services.

privacy_terms.heading: Family Fuel Terms of Service
privacy_terms.subtext:
Last Updated: October 26, 2023

Please read these Terms of Service (“Terms”) carefully before using the Family Fuel mobile application and related services (collectively, the “Service”) operated by Family Fuel (“us,” “we,” or “our”).

Your access to and use of the Service is conditioned on your acceptance of and compliance with these Terms. These Terms apply to all visitors, users, and others who access or use the Service. By accessing or using the Service, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you disagree with any part of the terms, then you may not access the Service.

**1. Accounts**

When you create an account with us, you must provide us with information that is accurate, complete, and current at all times. Failure to do so constitutes a breach of the Terms, which may result in immediate termination of your account on our Service.

You are responsible for safeguarding the password that you use to access the Service and for any activities or actions under your password, whether your password is with our Service or a third-party service.

You agree not to disclose your password to any third party. You must notify us immediately upon becoming aware of any breach of security or unauthorized use of your account.

You may not use as a username the name of another person or entity or that is not lawfully available for use, a name or trademark that is subject to any rights of another person or entity other than you without appropriate authorization, or a name that is otherwise offensive, vulgar or obscene.

**2. Subscriptions & Payments**

Some parts of the Service are billed on a subscription basis (“Subscription(s)”). You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis (such as weekly, monthly, or annually), depending on the type of Subscription plan you select when purchasing a Subscription.

At the end of each period, your Subscription will automatically renew under the exact same conditions unless you cancel it or Family Fuel cancels it.

*   **Subscription Cancellation:** You may cancel your Subscription renewal either through your account management page or by contacting Family Fuel customer support. Such cancellation will take effect at the end of the then-current Subscription period.

*   **Refunds:** Except when required by law, paid Subscription fees are non-refundable.
